hero.badge: Powered by AI · Al-Ahsa, Saudi Arabia
hero.title: Your Medical Journey
hero.subtitle: From first inquiry to full recovery — MedVisit transforms international patients' searches into complete, guided medical tourism experiences in Saudi Arabia.

features.title: Everything You Need in One Platform
features.subtitle: Five integrated modules working together to turn your medical inquiry into a successful treatment journey.

triage.title: AI Smart Triage
triage.description: Upload your medical reports and get instant AI-powered analysis directing you to the right specialty and facility.

pricing.title: Price Matching
pricing.description: Compare treatment packages across facilities to find options that fit your budget and timeline.

travel.title: Travel Coordinator
travel.description: End-to-end travel coordination — visa, flights, airport pickup, and hotel booking near your hospital.

chat.title: Multilingual Assistant
chat.description: Chat with our AI assistant in Arabic, English, and more — available 24/7 throughout your medical journey.

followup.title: Post-Treatment Care
followup.description: Stay connected with your doctor after returning home. Medication reminders, rehab schedules, and remote follow-ups.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Medical Journey?
cta.subtitle: Upload your medical reports and let our AI guide you to the best treatment options in Al-Ahsa and across Saudi Arabia.

triage.title: AI Medical Triage
triage.subtitle: Upload your medical reports and let our AI analyze them to recommend the best specialty and facility for your case.
